metadata.significance: Condemns those who backbite and slander, warns of hell's punishment

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ

translations.en_sahih: Woe to every scorner and mocker
translations.en_yusufali: Woe to every (kind of) scandal-monger and-backbiter,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecelakaan besar bagi tiap-tiap pencaci, pengeji,

translations.en_sahih: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
translations.en_yusufali: Who pileth up wealth and layeth it by,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang mengumpulkan harta dan berulang-ulang menghitung kekayaannya;

translations.en_sahih: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
translations.en_yusufali: Thinking that his wealth would make him last for ever!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menyangka bahawa hartanya itu dapat mengekalkannya (dalam dunia ini)!

translations.en_sahih: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
translations.en_yusufali: By no means! He will be sure to be thrown into That which Breaks to Pieces,
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak! Sesungguhnya dia akan dicampakkan ke dalam "Al-Hutamah".

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee That which Breaks to Pieces?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui, apa dia "Al-Hutamah" itu?

translations.en_sahih: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
translations.en_yusufali: (It is) the Fire of (the Wrath of) Allah kindled (to a blaze),
translations.ms_basmeih: (Al-Hutamah) ialah api Allah yang dinyalakan (dengan perintahNya), -

translations.en_sahih: Which mounts directed at the hearts.
translations.en_yusufali: The which doth mount (Right) to the Hearts:

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
translations.en_yusufali: It shall be made into a vault over them,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnnya api neraka itu ditutup rapat atas mereka.
(Mereka terikat di situ) pada batang-batang palang yang melintang panjang.
